description_long: This is a compact, single-story modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist white exterior. The front facade features large sliding glass doors and windows, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary appearance. A metal railing encloses a small porch or balcony area at the front, providing a subtle barrier and outdoor space. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with a few smaller windows and a simple, clean design. The house includes visible interior divisions, with open doorways and partitioned rooms, suggesting a functional layout. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and utilitarian, with an emphasis on simplicity and openness.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The front features a metal-railed porch and sliding glass doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing large sliding glass doors, two smaller windows, and a metal-railed porch.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid white wall and minimal window openings, porch railing visible at the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with two doors (one open), a large window, and interior room divisions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wall and the metal porch railing extending along the right edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large sliding glass doors opening onto a small porch with a metal railing, no steps or decorative overhangs.
